parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({properties: {dealname: 'MVA Intake - ' + ($('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.name || 'Unknown') + ' - ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.incident_date, pipeline: $('Validator').item.json.config.pipeline_id, dealstage: $('Qualifier').item.json.hubspot_stage_id, incident_date: $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.incident_date, incident_location: $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.location, within_statute: $('Qualifier').item.json.within_statute ? 'true' : 'false', at_fault: $('Validator').item.json.payload.qualification.at_fault ? 'true' : 'false', received_treatment: $('Validator').item.json.payload.qualification.received_treatment ? 'true' : 'false', other_party_insured: $('Validator').item.json.payload.qualification.other_party_insured ? 'true' : 'false', review_flags: ($('Validator').item.json.payload.qualification.flags || []).join(','), vapi_call_id: $('Validator').item.json.payload.call_id, description: 'Injury: ' + ($('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.injury_description || 'n/a') + '
Caller age: ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.age + ' | Death: ' + ($('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.death_involved ? 'Yes' : 'No') + '
Reason: ' + $('Qualifier').item.json.reason + '
Call: ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.started_at + ' to ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.ended_at + '
Audio: ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.audio_url + '

[Notes]
' + ($('Validator').item.json.payload.notes || '')}, associations: [{to: {id: $json.id}, types: [{associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 3}]}]}) }}

parameters.message: ={{ 'New qualified MVA lead - ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.name + ', ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.location + ', incident ' + $('Validator').item.json.payload.intake.incident_date + '. Reason: ' + $('Qualifier').item.json.reason + '. Deal: https://app-na2.hubspot.com/contacts/245727791/record/0-3/' + $json.id }}
